file.content:
name: Test Java
  
permissions: { }  

on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - '**'
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - v4.x.x
      - v5.x.x
      - v6.x.x
      - v7.x.x
      - renovate/**

jobs:
  build:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: true
      matrix:
        os:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - windows-latest
        version:
          - 21
    name: 'Build Java ${{ matrix.version }} - ${{ matrix.os }}'
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ matrix.version }}
          cache: 'maven'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn install -Pinclude-extra-modules -DskipTests=true -DskipITs=true -D"archetype.test.skip=true" -D"maven.javadoc.skip=true" --batch-mode -D"style.color=always" --show-version
      - name: Test
        run: mvn verify -Pinclude-extra-modules -D"style.color=always"

  javadoc:
    name: 'Javadoc'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '21'
          cache: 'maven'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn install -DskipTests=true -DskipITs=true -Darchetype.test.skip=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true --batch-mode -Dstyle.color=always --show-version
      - name: Javadoc
        run: mvn javadoc:jar -Dstyle.color=always

  semver:
    name: 'Semver'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '21'
          cache: 'maven'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn install -DskipTests=true -DskipITs=true -Darchetype.test.skip=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true --batch-mode -Dstyle.color=always --show-version
      - name: Test (Semver check)
        run: mvn verify -Pcheck-semantic-version -DskipTests=true -DskipITs=true -Darchetype.test.skip=true -Dstyle.color=always

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and Java 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Eclipse Temurin JDK 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and make run script executable
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and Java 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Eclipse Temurin JDK 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Maven 3.9.6 from source
RUN mkdir -p /opt/maven && \
    curl -fsSL https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.6/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.6-bin.tar.gz | \
    tar -xz -C /opt/maven --strip-components=1 && \
    ln -s /opt/maven/bin/mvn /usr/local/bin/mvn

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and make run script executable
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and Java 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Eclipse Temurin JDK 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and make run script executable
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8

# Install system dependencies and Java 21

    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    locales \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Generate UTF-8 locale

    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Maven 3.9.6 from source
RUN mkdir -p /opt/maven && \
    curl -fsSL https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.6/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.6-bin.tar.gz | \
    tar -xz -C /opt/maven --strip-components=1 && \
    ln -s /opt/maven/bin/mvn /usr/local/bin/mvn

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and make run script executable
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
